# Generated by tools/generate_stellar_ai_director_patch.py.
# Full-object override: intentionally replaces Stellar AI's alloys_expenditure_megastructures.
# Ownership note: this centralizes only the megastructure alloy reserve gate.

alloys_expenditure_megastructures = {
	resource = alloys
	type = expenditure
	category = megastructures

	potential = {
		is_country_type = default
		can_build_megastructures = yes
		NOT = { staid_pause_new_megastructure = yes }
	}

	weight = {
		weight = 0.55

		modifier = { factor = 0 staid_survival_mode = yes }
		modifier = { factor = 0.25 staid_recovery_mode = yes }
		modifier = { factor = 2.5 staid_megastructure_prep_ready = yes }
		modifier = {
			factor = 4
			staid_megastructure_commit_safe = yes
			any_owned_megastructure = { can_be_upgraded = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			has_technology = tech_mega_engineering
			used_naval_capacity_percent > 0.80
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			is_at_war = yes
			used_naval_capacity_percent < 0.95
		}
	}

	desired_min = {
		base = 0
		modifier = { add = 15000 staid_megastructure_prep_ready = yes }
		modifier = {
			add = 27000
			staid_megastructure_commit_safe = yes
			any_owned_megastructure = { can_be_upgraded = yes }
		}
	}

	desired_max = {
		base = 25000
		modifier = { add = 50000 has_technology = tech_mega_engineering }
		modifier = { add = 75000 staid_megastructure_prep_ready = yes }
		modifier = {
			add = 100000
			staid_megastructure_commit_safe = yes
			any_owned_megastructure = { can_be_upgraded = yes }
		}
	}
}
